zh.loveday, elmington, oxford: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文德比奧可福德

zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Agnes Lovingcote於大約1470年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文德比奧可福德時，她的父親Thomas Lovingott II32歲，母親Mary Alice Eddy28歲。她於1478年與sir Albert Oliver Hyde在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年5月5日在英國波克夏丹華斯享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Agnes Lovingcote于大约1470年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文德比奧可福德时，她的父亲Thomas Lovingott II32岁，母亲Mary Alice Eddy28岁。她于1478年与sir Albert Oliver Hyde在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年5月5日在英国波克夏丹華斯享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏丹華斯。

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Agnes Lovingcote was born about 1470, in Oxford, Derby, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Thomas Lovingott II, was 32 and her mother, Mary Alice Eddy, was 28. She married sir Albert Oliver Hyde in 1478, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 5 May 1523, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Agnes Lovingcote est née environ 1470, à Oxford, Derby, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Lovingott II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Alice Eddy, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé sir Albert Oliver Hyde en 1478, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1523, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1478 in Oxfordshire, England sir Albert Oliver Hyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1523 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Denchworth, Berkshire, England und wurde in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Lovingcoteが約1470年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンデルビーオクスフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Lovingott IIは32歳，母Mary Alice Eddyは28歳であった。1478年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでsir Albert Oliver Hydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年5月5日にイギリスバークシュアイアデンチウオルスで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアデンチウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.loveday, elmington, oxford: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 더비 스퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Lovingcote(이)가 대략 1470년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 더비 스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Lovingott II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Alice Eddy(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 sir Albert Oliver Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 5월 5일 영국 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 덴ch워스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com sir Albert Oliver Hyde em 1478, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.loveday, elmington, oxford: оксфорд, дирби, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Agnes Lovingcote родилась около 1470 г. в местности оксфорд, дирби, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Thomas Lovingott II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Alice Eddy, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени sir Albert Oliver Hyde в 1478 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 5 мая 1523 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Agnes Lovingcote nació aproximadamente 1470, en Oxford, Derby, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Lovingott II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mary Alice Eddy, tenía 28 años. Se casó con sir Albert Oliver Hyde en 1478, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1523, en Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Denchworth, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
